name_en: 🌷With full original red box packaging🌷【New Arrival】From mirror leather to sparkling crystals, Gucci offers a range of shiny items for the gift-giving season. Choose from printed accessories or shiny leather wallets to add a touch of style. This GG Marmont Super Mini bag is made of gold metallic leather.
name_cn:
🌷With full original red box packaging🌷【New Arrival】From mirror leather to sparkling crystals, Gucci offers a range of shiny items for the gift-giving season. Choose from printed accessories or shiny leather wallets to add a touch of style. This GG Marmont Super Mini bag is made of gold metallic leather.
Gold metallic houndstooth leather
Gold hardware
Cotton lining
Includes a key ring that can be attached to a separate bag
Double G
Chain shoulder strap, 60cm length
Weight: approx. 0.35kg
Model: 476433.
Size: 16.5cm(W) x 10cm(H) x 4.5cm(D).
Color: Gold leather/Original leather.
Italian made
